name: Queen's Blade RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

In the realm of Gainos, strength and beauty dictate destiny. Every four years, the Queen's Blade tournament draws warriors from across the continent; humans, elves, demons, and angels alike... each seeking power, glory, or freedom. Swords clash and spells ignite as contestants vie for the throne, their ambitions shaped by divine oversight and mortal rivalries. Leina Vance flees noble expectations to carve her own legend, while Aldra’s cursed reign threatens to bend all under her will. Alliances form, betrayals sting, and dark magic seeps through the land, from the Swamp Witch’s murky lair to the cursed ruins of Amara.

From the treacherous cliffs of Large Fang Mountain to the mystical Grimoire World, warriors face not only opponents but enchanted trials that test their skill, cunning, and resolve. Rebels rally under Annelotte’s banner, pirates prowl the skies, and ancient relics hum with forgotten power. Every duel, every decision, shifts the continent’s balance, as mortals, divines, and dark forces collide. In Gainos, fame can elevate a wanderer to Queen’s Blade champion, while a single misstep may summon ruin. Whether champion, outlaw, or schemer, the paths are endless and the world watches you with divine eyes.

Core Info:

Between the card and the lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Pre-Tournament Era" to the final in "Unlimited Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 66 characters from across all the anime, manga, games and collaborations.

Lorebook Info: 161 Entries = 70.000 Total Tokens

Note: Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 500–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

WARNING

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL.

Core History

Pre-Tournament Era
